# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The display name for the Service Principal (Azure AD Application and Service Principal object). This name should be unique within your Azure AD tenant."
      }
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().id]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The ID of the subscription where the Contributor role assignment will be created. Defaults to the current subscription."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the deployment script resources (e.g., storage account, container instance). This does not affect the global Service Principal or role assignment."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
    "uniqueDeploymentScriptSuffix": "[uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, deployment().name, parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Resources/deploymentScripts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-10-01",
      "name": "[concat('createSpAndGetPrincipalId-', variables('uniqueDeploymentScriptSuffix'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "AzureCLI",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "forceUpdateTag": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
        "azCliVersion": "2.58.0",
        "timeout": "PT30M",
        "cleanupPreference": "OnSuccess",
        "retentionInterval": "P1D",
        "environmentVariables": [
          {
            "name": "SERVICE_PRINCIPAL_NAME",
            "value": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
          }
        ],
        "scriptContent": "set -e\nSP_NAME=\"${SERVICE_PRINCIPAL_NAME}\"\n\n# Check if Azure AD Application already exists\nAPP_INFO=$(az ad app list --display-name \"${SP_NAME}\" --query \"[?displayName=='${SP_NAME}'].{appId:appId, objectId:id}\" -o json)\nAPP_ID=$(echo $APP_INFO | jq -r '.[0].appId
